description.ko: 백색광이 크리스탈 프리즘을 통해 찬란한 무지개 스펙트럼으로 변하는 찰나의 순간을 포착한 매혹적인 광학 시각화입니다.
description.en: A mesmerizing visualization of optical physics, capturing the precise moment a white light beam transforms into a brilliant spectrum through a crystal prism.

prompt: A high-quality macro shot of a triangular glass prism resting on a sleek, dark reflective surface. A single, concentrated beam of white light enters the prism from the left, undergoing chromatic dispersion to emerge as a vibrant, wide-angled rainbow spectrum on the right. Hyper-realistic details, volumetric lighting, sharp focus on the glass edges, refractive caustics, and subtle dust particles illuminated in the beam, 8k resolution, cinematic atmosphere.
